name: salesforce_weekly_report
workflow: Every Monday I download a CSV export from Salesforce, open it in Excel, remove duplicate leads, build a pivot table of deals by region, then paste a summary into an email I send to my manager.

name: support_ticket_triage
workflow: I read every new support ticket in Zendesk, tag it by product area, copy the customer details into a Google Sheet, and ping the right engineer on Slack. Takes me ~2 hours a day.

name: invoice_reconciliation
workflow: At month end I export invoices from QuickBooks as PDFs, type the amounts into a spreadsheet by hand, match them against bank statement lines, and flag mismatches for the finance lead.

name: vague_minimal
workflow: I do a lot of repetitive reporting stuff in spreadsheets.
